subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Lord, my Desire, my Light, my Glory, my Refuge, my Hope, bewildered am I by Thy mention! [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی و ربی و منائی و نوری و بهائی و ملجای و رجائی قد تحیرت من ذکرک
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
